blended.narrative: Belleayre Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. The 14-day outlook shows 12 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 50°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: 2.4" of snow, highs of 58°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 5" of snow, highs of 50°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
